productTitle: MikroTik CRS504-4XQ+IN Switch – 4x 100G QSFP28 High Performance
name: MikroTik CRS504-4XQ-IN
title: MikroTik CRS504-4XQ-IN
title_extended: MikroTik CRS504-4XQ+IN Switch – 4x 100G QSFP28 High Performance
short_description: Cloud Router Switch, 1x 100Mbit Ethernet port, 4x 100G QSFP28 ports, RouterOS v7
description: Cloud Router Switch, 1x 100Mbit Ethernet port, 4x 100G QSFP28 ports, RouterOS v7

detailed_description.heading: Advanced 100 Gigabit Networking
detailed_description.text:
The MikroTik CRS504-4XQ-IN switch is designed for data centres, ISPs, and modern infrastructures, offering a 100 Gigabit networking capability. This high-speed feature is crucial as businesses handle more data and devices, requiring rapid data transfer rates.

With 100 Gigabit speeds, users can experience reduced latency and faster access to services. This can be particularly useful for tasks like large data uploads, streaming, and real-time communication. For instance, data centres can manage servers more efficiently, and ISPs can deliver better internet services. The switch is also beneficial for businesses wanting efficient intra-office networks or private cloud setups.

detailed_description.heading: Robust Internal Architecture
detailed_description.text: The switch is powered by the robust QCA9531 chipset, operating on a single core at 650 MHz, and supported by 64 MB of RAM. This combination ensures stable and reliable operation, essential for enterprises reliant on uninterrupted connectivity. Its 16 MB of storage capacity ensures the switch handles its firmware and updates efficiently. As technology and security needs evolve, this MikroTik switch remains current and secure. Equipped with RouterOS Level 5, the device boasts an array of networking capabilities, granting network administrators the flexibility to efficiently manage traffic, enforce security protocols, and optimize bandwidth distribution across diverse networking environments.

detailed_description.heading: Adaptable Connection Options
detailed_description.text: The CRS504-4XQ-IN stands out with its four 100G QSFP28 ports, allowing seamless connections to other 100 Gigabit devices. With the added advantage of breakout cables, you can connect to several 25 Gigabit devices. Essentially, each port 100G ties into four 25 Gigabit lines, giving you the capacity to connect up to 16 x 25 Gigabit devices. Whether you need a 100 Gigabit link on one port, a 40 Gigabit on another, or a combination of connections, the MikroTik CRS504-4XQ-IN provides the flexibility you’re seeking. Additionally, its Ethernet port serves as a handy tool for efficient management, providing easy access to the switch's main functions and simplifying diagnostics, configurations, and maintenance.

detailed_description.heading: Versatile Powering Options
detailed_description.text:
The switch features a dual hot-swappable PSU, allowing for installation and removal while the server is running, without disrupting the server's functions. It also introduces versatile power options tailored to different scenarios:

The conventional DC jack provides a familiar power interface for many, while the 2-pin terminal offers a more direct and robust connection, ideal for locations where ensuring stability is paramount. The advanced 802.3bt PoE-in stands out for its dual benefits: it not only powers the switch but also allows data transmission over a single cable, simplifying installations and reducing cable clutter. Such flexibility in power options ensures the switch can maintain continuous operation whether it's deployed in remote outdoor stations, temporary event setups, or critical infrastructure locations.

items.name: Power Supply
items.value: Internal x2 redundant PSU, External x2 AC/DC Adapter
